ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Final/Complete Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Mar-17-2009 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Final/Complete Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Feb-17-2009 Continued To Mar-17-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Winslow for Shirley Davenport (Administrator).

Mr. Winslow stated that the only asset was a check in the amount of $230,000.00 made payable to the Administrator from the Trust and that the amount needed to be valuated by the Probate Referee because the check was not made out to the Decedent. In addition, he stated that the funds were deposited into a Wells Frago account in San Francisco, that a Medicare lien in the amount of $20,000.00 had been paid, that the Beneficiaries had waived bond and that he was waiting for the Inventory and Appraisal to be returned by the Probate Referee. The matter was continued to March 17, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-20-2008 Granted Per Written Order
